description.value:
Helldrives are unique tools of the hellforged, but your unique hardware means you can replicate the effects of a tool most adventurers rarely ever see: a Helldrive. You can spend a single Interact action to connect yourself to a starship. While you're connected, you gain +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks and can grant this circumstance bonus to the pilot of the vessel as well by spending a single action with the concentrate trait. Once per day, you can give a starship you're connected to the ability to travel long distances in space as if it had a Drift Engine.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Unauthorized Helldriver]
